claimBoundary: This ledger classifies live-proof applicability and current evidence for five generic CVF system-chain lanes. It preserves each source map verdict and does not treat SOT3 UC-01 as proof of any other lane. SCLP-T5 (2026-07-15) reconciled all four use cases and five lanes, retained their bounded evidence states, and retired the stale UC-03 next-use-case pointer after UC-03 closure.

useCases.scope: selected CVF Web knowledge-context path, controlled scenario, Alibaba provider lane, environment, and evidence window
useCases.notProven: other system chains, universal SOT3 activation, production, scale, public shipment, or real-user value

useCases.scope: registry-driven CF-076 through CF-084 invocation chain
useCases.selectionReason: current map says connected, while cited per-checker PASS rows are historical rather than a retained current-run receipt
useCases.nextAction: retain this bounded proof; repair downstream generated Markdown conformance separately without rerunning UC-02

useCases.scope: one active caller-backed Governance Control Matrix route selected by source verification; unresolved no-caller rows remain excluded
useCases.selectionReason: file existence and unit tests do not prove production invocation
useCases.nextAction: retain the bounded GC-011 result; do not promote GC-009 or GC-010; repair the harness only if a later proof must reuse per-case receipt identity

useCases.scope: CLI current-run readout first, then the bounded Web Operations subset as a separate scenario
useCases.selectionReason: source inspection proves wiring shape but not current operator usability
useCases.nextAction: retain CLI plus the selected Web developer-success/reviewer-denial pair; do not expand into unified checker inventory without a separate value-assessed packet

lanes.reason: doctrine ownership and mapping are read-time governance properties, not runtime invocation claims
lanes.nextAction: refresh source mapping and gap dispositions during the next governed semantic review

lanes.reason: the representative GC-011 path executed once through CvfSdk into PipelineOrchestrator with positive and fail-closed negative cases; this operational proof does not change the lane's PARTIAL semantic posture or promote invocation-unproven rows
lanes.nextAction: retain the bounded GC-011 receipt and explicit GC-009/GC-010 exclusion; reopen only for a materially different contract-to-runtime claim or proven active caller

lanes.reason: the repaired shared bootstrap passed once and the retained registry-driven UC-02 runner recorded CF-076 through CF-084 as nine of nine PASS in one current invocation
lanes.nextAction: retain the bounded receipt; treat downstream generated-artifact conformance as a separate GAP and do not rerun UC-02 for that repair

lanes.reason: citation/path integrity is a repository property and is proved by fresh deterministic recomputation, not a provider or runtime call
lanes.nextAction: recompute citation and path dispositions when either evidence-owner document changes

lanes.reason: the CLI surface and selected Web pair are proven bounded: the developer path succeeds and the reviewer path is denied before runner/provider work with exact one-submission evidence; the lane remains semantically PARTIAL because no unified Web checker inventory is claimed
lanes.nextAction: retain bounded CLI and selected Web pair evidence; reopen only for a materially broader, value-assessed operator-surface claim
